sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n45803" key="e)fodhge/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐφοδ-ηγέω</orth>, <sense id="n45803.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">act as guide</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
